creator: deepbluemistake@gmail.com
text:
The XHTML is invalid on this page and many many others:
https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.0R/relnotes.html
(I used this page just as an example)
It's proclaimed as invalid in both of these:
https://validator.w3.org/
https://validator.w3.org/nu/

I'm proficient with both HTML and C.  I'm willing to fix this if I can be pointed toward what the XHTML generator is.  Is it a vanilla version of DocBook, or something else?
